acceptance_results.criterion: Named emails resolve as platform-scoped webspa users with tenant options.
Backend accepts selected tenant headers only for platform-scoped JWT identities.
Mapping contract documents tenant admin and platform admin assignment.

cleanup_notes: No long-running services were left running.
completed_work: Added frontend bootstrap admin mapping for the requested emails with runtime-overridable tenant workspace catalog.
Added backend Auth0 email extraction and bootstrap platform scope for the requested emails.
Changed backend admin middleware to apply selected tenant headers only for platform-scoped identities and to allow tenant headers in CORS preflight.
Required verified email for bootstrap platform grants, made backend bootstrap config fail closed when unset, and resolved platform selected tenant keys to tenant IDs for reports.
Documented how new user accounts map to tenant admin or platform admin access.
known_gaps: No database admin membership table exists; Auth0 claims and bootstrap config remain the source of truth.
The committed default tenant workspace is legacy-default; production can supply the full tenant catalog through Auth0 metadata or window.__ADMIN_TENANT_BOOTSTRAP__.
operator_message: TMP-048 gives the two requested emails admin workspace access and documents the account-to-tenant mapping contract.
risk_notes: Bootstrap emails are explicit privileged principals. Production should keep ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP_PLATFORM_EMAILS and runtime tenant catalog aligned with operational policy.
summary: Granted explicit bootstrap all-tenant admin workspace access for almauricin@gmail.com and seidu.abdulai@hotmail.com while preserving backend tenant isolation.
